name: So Easy Fish
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Rinse fish and pat dry with paper towels.
3. Lightly grease a small shallow baking pan with some of the oil.
4. Rub remaining oil over top of fish.
5. In a small bowl, combine remaining ingredients and sprinkle evenly over fish.
6. Bake, uncovered, about 20 minutes or until fish flakes easily.
